subject: [PATCH v2 11/14] userfaultfd: add UFFD_FEATURE_RWP_ASYNC for async fault resolution

2026-05-12.patch_summary: This patch adds a new feature to the Linux userfaultfd system, called UFFD_FEATURE_RWP_ASYNC. This feature allows for asynchronous resolution of read-write page faults, which is useful for working-set tracking in virtual machines. The kernel can now restore access to pages in-place without blocking the faulting thread, and the VMM can reconstruct the access pattern after the fact via PAGEMAP_SCAN. Additionally, this patch upgrades writable private anon PTEs when necessary to prevent COW-faults on re-access of RWP'd writable pages.
